title: Professions & Workplace
description: Learn to talk about professions and jobs in Czech. Practice the instrumental case with 'být' (to be) and the construction 'pracovat jako' (to work as) with the nominative case.

exercises.prompt: Match each Czech profession with its English translation.

data.instructions_cz: Spojte české profese s anglickým překladem.
data.instructions_en: Match each Czech profession with its English translation.
data.explanation: These are common masculine profession nouns in Czech. The feminine forms add -ka: lékařka, učitelka, inženýrka, právnička.

exercises.prompt: Match each Czech profession with its English translation.

data.instructions_cz: Spojte české profese s anglickým překladem.
data.instructions_en: Match each Czech profession with its English translation.
data.explanation: More common professions. Feminine forms: programátorka, kuchařka, řidička, prodavačka. Note that 'řidič' can mean any driver (taxi, bus, truck).

exercises.prompt: Complete the sentence with the instrumental form: 'On je ___ (lékař).'

data.question_en: Complete with the instrumental form: 'He is a doctor.'
data.explanation: After 'být' (to be), the profession takes the instrumental case: lékař → lékařem. 'On je lékařem.' = He is a doctor. The instrumental ending for masculine animate nouns is -em.

exercises.prompt: What case follows 'pracovat jako' (to work as)?

data.question_en: What case follows 'pracovat jako' (to work as)?
data.explanation: 'Pracovat jako' is followed by the nominative case: 'Pracuje jako lékař' (not 'lékařem'). This contrasts with 'být' + instrumental: 'Je lékařem.' Both mean 'He is/works as a doctor' but use different cases.

exercises.prompt: Fill in the instrumental form of 'učitelka' (female teacher): 'Ona je ___.

data.explanation: Feminine nouns ending in -ka form the instrumental by changing -ka to -kou: učitelka → učitelkou. 'Ona je učitelkou.' = She is a teacher.

exercises.prompt: Fill in the instrumental form of 'inženýr': 'Můj bratr je ___.

data.explanation: Masculine animate nouns ending in a consonant add -em in the instrumental: inženýr → inženýrem. 'Můj bratr je inženýrem.' = My brother is an engineer.

exercises.prompt: Translate to Czech: 'She works as a lawyer.'

data.grammar_note: 'Pracovat jako' + nominative. 'Pracuje jako právník' = She works as a lawyer. You can also use the feminine form 'právnícička' — but note 'právník' is often used for both genders in professional contexts. The feminine form is 'právníčka'.

'On je programátorem' uses the instrumental case ('programátorem') after 'být'. This is the formal/standard form. In colloquial Czech, you may also hear 'On je programátor' (nominative). Both mean 'He is a programmer.'

exercises.prompt: Find and correct the error in this sentence.

data.explanation: 'Pracovat jako' takes the nominative case, not the instrumental. 'Lékařem' is instrumental — correct after 'být' (je lékařem) but wrong after 'jako'. The correct sentence is 'On pracuje jako lékař.' Compare: 'On je lékařem.' (být + instrumental) vs. 'On pracuje jako lékař.' (jako + nominative).

exercises.prompt: Arrange the words to form: 'My sister works as a teacher.'

data.explanation: 'Moje sestra pracuje jako učitelka.' = My sister works as a teacher. 'Pracovat jako' + nominative (učitelka, not učitelkou). Word order: subject + verb + jako + profession.

exercises.prompt: Pronounce the following sentence about your profession.
Complete the dialogue about professions at a social gathering.

data.scenario: Na párty — At a party. Two people meet and ask about each other's jobs.

lines.speaker: person_a
lines.text: Aha, tak co děláte? Jakou máte profesi?

lines.speaker: person_a
lines.text: To je zajímavé! A pracujete jako lékař dlouho?

lines.speaker: person_b
lines.text: Ano, už deset let. A co vy? Co děláte?

data.explanation: 'Jsem lékařem' uses the instrumental case after 'být' (GR-240). 'Pracuji v nemocnici' = I work in a hospital (v + locative). 'Jakou máte profesi?' = What is your profession? Note the formal address ('děláte', 'máte', 'pracujete').
blank_answers: Jsem lékařem a pracuji v nemocnici.
